title: LOCO Diwali Battle/Grand Finals
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: LOCO Diwali Battle: Grand Finals}} {{Upthrust Esports Navbox}} {{Tabs static |name1=League Stage|link1=LOCO_Diwali_Battle/League_Stage |name2=Grand Finals|link2=LOCO_Diwali_Battle/Grand_Finals |this=1 }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=LOCO Diwali Battle: Grand Finals |icon= |tickername=LOCO Diwali Battle: GF |shortname=LOCO Diwali Battle: GF |image=LOCO Diwali Battle logo.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=LOCO Diwali Battle |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=20,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-11-18 |edate=2021-11-22 |twitter= |instagram=upthrust_esports |web= |linkedin=company/upthrust-esports |loco=streamers/upthrustesports |discord=zZQMMPeEj7 |facebook= |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS }} '''''[http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''''' in association with '''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' on the occasion of the festival of lights Diwali present a BGMI tournament called the '''''LOCO Diwali Battle''''' with a prize pool of ₹30,00,000 INR. The Grand Finals feature a prize pool of ₹20,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi |b2=Gamezo Tech |b3=RA1 }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''LOCO Diwali Battle Grand Finals:''' 18th November 2021 to 22nd October 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]] * ''Top 18 teams from [[LOCO_Diwali_Battle/League_Stage|League Stage]] will compete in the Grand-Finals.'' * ''30 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days.'' * ''Each day will feature a total of 6 matches.'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=101px|Place !width=101px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-18}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹20,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $26,971 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
